A

addMovie(Movie) - Method in class MovieDatabase
Inserts a valid movie record into the database when the movie ID is unused.
addMovie(Movie) - Method in class MovieManager
Adds one valid movie to the collection when its ID is not already used.
addMovies(ArrayList<Movie>) - Method in class MovieManager
Adds multiple valid movies to the collection.

B

buildScreen() - Method in class MovieTrackerGUI
Creates the main screen layout for the GUI.

C

calculateAverageRating() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Calculates the average rating of all database movie records.
calculateAverageRating() - Method in class MovieManager
Calculates the average rating of all stored movies.
calculateTotalRuntime() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Calculates the total runtime of all database movie records.
calculateTotalRuntime() - Method in class MovieManager
Calculates the combined runtime of all stored movies.
close() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Closes the database connection or fallback storage mode when the program exits.
connect(String) - Method in class MovieDatabase
Connects to the SQLite database file selected by the user.
copy() - Method in class Movie
Creates a separate Movie object with the same field values.
createTable() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Creates the movies table in the connected database when it does not already exist.

D

deleteMovie(int) - Method in class MovieDatabase
Deletes one movie record from the database by ID.
displayMovies() - Method in class MovieManager
Returns copies of all stored movies for safe display.

F

FileLoadResult - Class in Unnamed Package
Stores the outcome of loading movie data from an external text source.
FileLoadResult(ArrayList<Movie>, int, boolean, String) - Constructor for class FileLoadResult
Creates a file-load result with the loaded movies and status details.
findMovieById(int) - Method in class MovieDatabase
Finds one movie record by ID.
findMovieById(int) - Method in class MovieManager
Finds a movie by its ID.
findMovieByTitle(String) - Method in class MovieManager
Finds the first movie with a matching title.
formatMovieTable() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Builds a formatted display table of all movie records in the database.
formatMovieTable() - Method in class MovieManager
Builds a formatted table of all stored movies.

G

getCalculationSummary() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Builds the custom calculation summary for the GUI output area.
getCalculationSummary() - Method in class MovieManager
Builds the custom calculation summary shown to the user.
getDatabasePath() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Returns the database path currently assigned to this database manager.
getGenre() - Method in class Movie
Returns the movie genre.
getMessage() - Method in class FileLoadResult
Returns the result message for the file operation.
getMovieCount() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Counts the number of movie records stored in the database.
getMovieCount() - Method in class MovieManager
Returns the number of movies stored in the manager.
getMovieId() - Method in class Movie
Returns the movie's unique ID.
getMovies() - Method in class FileLoadResult
Returns a copy of the movies loaded from the source.
getRating() - Method in class Movie
Returns the user rating for the movie.
getReleaseYear() - Method in class Movie
Returns the movie release year.
getRuntimeMinutes() - Method in class Movie
Returns the movie runtime in minutes.
getSkippedLines() - Method in class FileLoadResult
Returns the number of invalid lines skipped during file loading.
getTitle() - Method in class Movie
Returns the movie title.

I

isConnected() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Reports whether the database layer is ready for use.
isSuccessful() - Method in class FileLoadResult
Returns whether the file operation completed successfully.
isWatched() - Method in class Movie
Returns whether the movie has been watched.

L

loadMovies() - Method in class MovieDatabase
Loads all movie records currently stored in the database.
loadMoviesFromFile(String) - Method in class MovieFileReader
Loads movie records from the supplied text file path.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class MovieApp
Starts the Movie Tracker GUI on the Swing event dispatch thread.
Movie - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents one movie record in the Movie Tracker DMS.
Movie(int, String, String, int, int, double, boolean) - Constructor for class Movie
Creates a movie record with all values needed by the DMS.
MovieApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Launches Phase 4 of the Movie Tracker Data Management System.
MovieApp() - Constructor for class MovieApp
Creates a MovieApp object.
MovieDatabase - Class in Unnamed Package
Manages the SQLite database backend for Phase 4 of the Movie Tracker DMS.
MovieDatabase() - Constructor for class MovieDatabase
Creates a database manager with no active database connection.
MovieFileReader - Class in Unnamed Package
Reads movie records from a pipe-delimited text file.
MovieFileReader() - Constructor for class MovieFileReader
Creates a file reader for loading movie records from text files.
MovieManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Manages an in-memory collection of Movie objects for the Movie Tracker DMS.
MovieManager() - Constructor for class MovieManager
Creates an empty movie manager with the accepted release-year range.
MovieTrackerCLI - Class in Unnamed Package
Provides the command-line interface used in the earlier Movie Tracker DMS phases.
MovieTrackerCLI(MovieManager) - Constructor for class MovieTrackerCLI
Creates a command-line interface connected to the supplied movie manager.
MovieTrackerGUI - Class in Unnamed Package
Creates the Phase 4 graphical user interface for the Movie Tracker DMS.
MovieTrackerGUI(MovieDatabase) - Constructor for class MovieTrackerGUI
Creates a GUI connected to the supplied database access object.

R

removeMovieById(int) - Method in class MovieManager
Removes a movie from the collection using its ID.
removeMovieByTitle(String) - Method in class MovieManager
Removes the first movie with a matching title.

S

setGenre(String) - Method in class Movie
Updates the movie genre when the supplied value is not blank.
setMovieId(int) - Method in class Movie
Updates the movie ID when the supplied value is positive.
setRating(double) - Method in class Movie
Updates the rating when the supplied value is between 0.0 and 10.0.
setReleaseYear(int) - Method in class Movie
Updates the release year when it falls within the accepted range.
setRuntimeMinutes(int) - Method in class Movie
Updates the runtime when the supplied value is positive.
setTitle(String) - Method in class Movie
Updates the movie title when the supplied value is not blank.
setWatched(boolean) - Method in class Movie
Updates the watched status for the movie.
showWindow() - Method in class MovieTrackerGUI
Builds and displays the main GUI window.
start() - Method in class MovieTrackerCLI
Starts the command-line menu loop and continues until the user chooses to exit.

T

toFileLine() - Method in class Movie
Converts this movie to the pipe-delimited format used by text storage.
toString() - Method in class Movie
Builds a readable string representation of this movie.
toTableRow() - Method in class Movie
Formats this movie as one row for text-based table output.

U

updateGenre(int, String) - Method in class MovieManager
Updates the genre of an existing movie.
updateMovie(int, Movie) - Method in class MovieDatabase
Updates the editable values for an existing movie record.
updateMovieId(int, int) - Method in class MovieManager
Changes a movie's ID when the current ID exists and the new ID is valid and unused.
updateRating(int, double) - Method in class MovieManager
Updates the rating of an existing movie.
updateReleaseYear(int, int) - Method in class MovieManager
Updates the release year of an existing movie.
updateRuntimeMinutes(int, int) - Method in class MovieManager
Updates the runtime of an existing movie.
updateTitle(int, String) - Method in class MovieManager
Updates the title of an existing movie.
updateWatched(int, boolean) - Method in class MovieManager
Updates the watched status of an existing movie.

V

validateMovie(Movie) - Method in class MovieDatabase
Validates a movie record before it is stored in the database.
validateMovie(Movie) - Method in class MovieManager
Checks whether a movie record contains valid values.
